heroHeadline: Wake up already done. Brows, lips, lashes & freckles — inked softly, by Lorena.
bookingNotice: A deposit secures your appointment; the balance is paid at the salon.
cancellationPolicy: Cancel at least 48 hours before your appointment for a full deposit refund. Within 48 hours the deposit is non-refundable, but message Lorena and she'll do her best to rearrange.
